resources.string: One place for all your tasks
You can seamlessly track and organize household, work and personal tasks all in one convenient place.
Effortlessly monitor your hydration levels, engage in physical activities, follow the daily routine and more.
Track your accomplishment, viewing productivity statics and receiving well-deserved rewards.
Explore global map of wind, weather, and ocean conditions
Planing your trip become more easier with ideate weather app. you can instantly see the whole word weather within few second
